ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "favorited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is favorited */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been favorited */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tweet was created */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "retweeted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet was retweeted */,
  "cleaned_text" TEXT /* Cleaned text of the tweet for analysis */,
  "contains_email" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet contains an email address */,
  "reply_to_sn" TEXT /* Screen name of the user being replied to */,
  "reply_to_sid" TEXT /* ID of the status being replied to */,
  "status_source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet status */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "geo_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the tweet */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the place where the tweet was posted */,
  "is_quote" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a quote tweet */,
  "quoted_status_id" TEXT /* ID of the quoted tweet */,
  "quoted_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user whose tweet was quoted */,
  "quoted_screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user whose tweet was quoted */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet contains sensitive content */,
  "possibly_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is possibly sensitive */,
  "entities" TEXT /* JSON object containing entities (hashtags, URLs, user mentions, etc.) */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user being replied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user profile */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Count of followers for the user */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Count of users that the user is following */,
  "status_count" INTEGER /* Count of tweets posted by the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "protected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is protected */,
  "statuses_count" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets posted by the user */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of public lists the user is a member of */,
  "favourites_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the user has */,
  "default_profile" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has a default profile */,
  "default_profile_image" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has a default profile image */,
  "withheld_in_countries" TEXT /* Countries where the user is withheld */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that this sentiment analysis relates to */,
  "compound" REAL /* Compound score from sentiment analysis */,
  "negative" REAL /* Negative score from sentiment analysis */,
  "positive" REAL /* Positive score from sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label of the sentiment (e.g., positive, neutral, negative) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., emotion, polarity) */,
  "sentiment_source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment analysis (e.g., algorithm, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each hashtag record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet associated with the hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* The hashtag text */,
  "hashtag_start_index" INTEGER /* Start index of the hashtag in the tweet text */,
  "hashtag_end_index" INTEGER /* End index of the hashtag in the tweet text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_mentions" (
  "mention_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user mention record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet containing the mention */,
  "mentioned_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  "mentioned_screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the mentioned user */,
  "mention_start_index" INTEGER /* Start index of the mention in the tweet text */,
  "mention_end_index" INTEGER /* End index of the mention in the tweet text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each retweet record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the retweeted tweet */,
  "original_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the original tweet being retweeted */,
  "retweet_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who retweeted */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the retweet occurred */,
  "retweet_count_at_time" INTEGER /* Retweet count at the time of retweeting */,
  "favorite_count_at_time" INTEGER /* Favorite count at the time of retweeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each favorite record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the favorited tweet */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who favorited the tweet */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tweet was favorited */,
  "retweet_count_at_time" INTEGER /* Retweet count at the time of favoriting */,
  "favorite_count_at_time" INTEGER /* Favorite count at the time of favoriting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reply_to" (
  "reply_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each reply record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that contains the reply */,
  "reply_to_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  "reply_to_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the reply */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reply was created */,
  "reply_count_at_time" INTEGER /* Reply count at the time of replying */,
  "retweet_count_at_time" INTEGER /* Retweet count at the time of replying */,
  "favorite_count_at_time" INTEGER /* Favorite count at the time of replying */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reply_to_reply_to_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reply_to_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_sources" (
  "source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each source record */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used to post the tweet (e.g., mobile, web) */,
  "app_version" TEXT /* Version of the app used to post the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet associated with the analytics */,
  "total_retweets" INTEGER /* Total number of retweets for the tweet */,
  "total_favorites" INTEGER /* Total number of favorites for the tweet */,
  "total_replies" INTEGER /* Total number of replies for the tweet */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics were created */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Overall engagement score of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_change" REAL /* Change in sentiment over time */,
  "reach_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated reach of the tweet */,
  "impression_count" INTEGER /* Number of impressions the tweet received */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_logs" (
  "log_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that this log is related to */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message describing the processing step or error */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., error, info, debug) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_logs_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)
